prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to England and includes data and regulations set by the Environment Agency and the Environmental Targets (Water) (England) Regulations 2023, which do not apply to Scotland. Scotland has its own separate environmental regulations and management practices.
